current_beat: Tests compressed, Mateo deeper in code, 0.9743 approaching

relationships.renata-yuki: Renata called Yuki; both sensing something unsaid
relationships.ephrem-yara: Dispute over topology vs safety architecture; unresolved
relationships.mateo-yuki: Met at technical review; mutual recognition through systems thinking; sharing audit findings

events: T1: Yuki detects residuals in Rubin pipeline.
T2: Yuki shows data to Andrés. Confirmation begins.
T3: Mateo at Paranal, ordinary life.
T4: Renata models object interior (0.003 match to Earth). Ephrem sees topology. Renata calls Yuki.
T5: Press leaks. Article calls Yuki 'la científica.' She doesn't correct it. Mother asks about the box.
T6: Renata's notebook. Night before sharing results.
T7: Renata presents Earth match. Ephrem sees surface without boundary.
T8: Kwame sees temporal displacement signal. 4.7 microseconds before sent.
T9: Yara recruited. Nadia's energy list. 0.9743 planted in prototype calibration.
T10: Ephrem's closed-surface proof. Yuki calls mother. 'Bientôt.'
T11: Yara-Ephrem dispute. Safety architecture vs topology. The frontier may not exist.
T12: Paradox goes public. Jeanne organizes opposition in Lyon. Père Okonkwo asks 'Qui?' in Rome. Amir ratifies construction in Geneva. Yuki runs, calls mother, says 'Bientôt' again.
T13: Construction begins. Helena touches the concrete. The constant 0.9743 migrates from prototype to production in a routine JIRA ticket. Mateo at Paranal receives integration email.
T14: Mateo transferred to Atacama. Calls parents. Father: 'C'est un travail important.' Arrives at the complex. Opens the code — recognizes function names, not the code inside them.
T15: Mateo audits the system. Finds undocumented workarounds, hardcoded constants. Meets Yuki at a technical review — she asks about the sleep(50). Mutual recognition.

T16: Kwame sees the echo — a pre-signal in calibration tests. Temporal displacement signature where there shouldn't be one. Nadia sees 0.04% charge deviation, asks for extra test, told schedule doesn't permit. Both document. Neither connects to the other.
